request_payload.exposure_text: Remember when the 2024 cyberattack paralyzed our power grid for days? We can't afford to be unprepared again. Local civil defense groups are stepping up, but they need our support. Without proper funding, we're leaving our communities vulnerable. It's time to prioritize civil defense preparedness—our safety can't wait for bureaucrats to act. #CommunityFirst #CivilDefenseNow
